…

posts.author: royha (roy)
posts.cookedHtml:
Currently we have alot of views, since we managed multiple teams in the same board
I think it will be very helpful to have folders for views
For example

Folder - Devops

  • View: Sprint
  • View : planning
  • View : dashboard

Folder - Devs

  • View: Sprint
  • View : planning
  • View : dashboard

Folder - Your stuff (a collection of views of things you created)

  • View: Created by me
  • View : Assigned to me
  • View : Where I was mentioned (this filter doesnt exists , but maybe it should

eventually not showing all of the views in a clear way makes people create multiple identicail or similar views and there’s a sense of disorder

If we could have permissions or at least group-based filters for each folder that would be great !
